_comment: Per-key LWW over the config-backed `setting` entity. Each syncable key is its own record (id = canonical dotted path), so resume_style (C3D4 @ 12:00) overrides A1B2's 10:00 without touching prompts.score. A deleted prompt override tombstones. enabled_sources rides as its canonical sorted list. A conforming merge must reproduce this exactly.

ai.api_key._won_from: C3D4 @ 11:00 — the AI key syncs through the user-owned folder
